overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars video game showing a character exploring a desert canyon landscape at sunset. The character walks along ridge lines and through narrow rocky passages with a small creature companion following behind, approaching a distant settlement built into the mountains.

events.description: character turns right to survey the valley landscape

agents.ego_description: walking along the ridge line overlooking the valley, pausing to survey the landscape with the settlement visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: small creature companion following closely behind the character

entered.detail: large rocky mountain structure with buildings built into the peaks
winding river running through the valley floor below
distant buildings and structures visible across the valley
small flying vehicles moving across the sky in the distance
sparse desert vegetation including agave-like plants

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a desert ridge during a purple sunset, overlooking a vast valley with a winding river and distant settlement. Sparse vegetation dots the landscape while flying speeders move across the hazy sky, and the character's small companion follows behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to narrow canyon passage between rock formations

events.description: character turns left and begins walking toward the canyon entrance

agents.ego_description: turning left away from the valley view and walking toward the canyon entrance between large rock formations

entered.detail: narrow opening between two large rock walls leading into the canyon
tall rocky cliff face forming the left side of the canyon entrance
tall rocky cliff face forming the right side of the canyon entrance

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and walks away from the valley overlook, approaching a narrow canyon entrance between towering rock walls. The mountain fortress remains visible to the left while the character heads toward the darkening canyon passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage with high walls

events.description: entering the narrow canyon between high rock walls, sky becomes partially obscured

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow canyon passage with rock walls rising on both sides, occasionally looking up at the sky

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the narrow canyon, with rock walls now looming close on both sides. The lighting becomes more diffused as the canyon walls block the sunset, and the path winds between the towering stone formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep canyon approaching water with artificial lighting

events.description: entering darker section of canyon with artificial marker lights visible along the path

agents.ego_description: continuing through the canyon toward a body of water visible ahead, descending slightly along the rocky path

entered.detail: body of water visible at the end of the canyon passage
small artificial lights on poles marking the path along the canyon wall

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through the deepest part of the canyon where the sky is mostly blocked by overhanging rock. Artificial marker lights illuminate the path as the character approaches a body of water at the canyon's end, with the environment growing darker and more enclosed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an expansive desert overlook into the depths of a darkening, enclosed canyon. It begins on a high ridge under a purple sunset, overlooking a vast valley with a winding river and a distant settlement while speeders drift through the hazy sky. As the character turns away from the vista, the camera follows them toward a narrow canyon entrance, with the mountain fortress remaining visible to the left before the towering rock walls begin to close in. The scene then shifts into a more diffused light as the path winds deeper between looming stone formations that gradually block out the sunset. Finally, the environment grows increasingly dark and enclosed, moving through the deepest part of the canyon where artificial marker lights illuminate the way toward a body of water.
